character_dossiers.name: Squire Trelawney
character_dossiers.biography: Part of the group that asked the narrator to write about Treasure Island.

character_dossiers.name: Dr. Livesey
character_dossiers.biography: Part of the group that asked the narrator to write about Treasure Island.

character_dossiers.name: my father
character_dossiers.biography: Owner of the Admiral Benbow inn.

character_dossiers.name: the old sea-dog
character_dossiers.biography: Tall, strong, heavy, nut-brown man with a sabre cut. Sings a sea-song, drinks rum, and stays at the inn.

character_dossiers.name: the brown old seaman
character_dossiers.biography: Described as the same as the old sea-dog, with a sabre cut.

character_dossiers.name: Captain
character_dossiers.biography: Refers to himself as Captain. Speaks to the narrator about lodging and rum.
